overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along wet city sidewalks past towering neon-lit skyscrapers, digital billboards, and holographic advertisements. The atmosphere features reflective wet pavement, atmospheric haze, and dense urban architecture with a cool blue-teal color palette accented by vibrant neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a concrete sidewalk next to a building with a prominent 'GUAPO' neon billboard. The camera walks forward and turns right to reveal a major city intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows and an elevated highway ramp curving overhead.

segments.scene_description: The camera pans up to reveal massive skyscrapers towering into the night sky, then looks back down to the wet street level showing light traffic and reflective pavement. The elevated highway ramp remains visible on the right while the view opens up to the expansive city intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and walks back along the sidewalk, passing a series of bright digital advertising pillars and holographic billboards. Two NPCs sit on a bench near a 'MILFGUARD' advertisement while the camera moves past various futuristic product displays.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow walkway between towering buildings with overhead power lines visible against the sky. The walls are lined with large digital billboards including one for 'NOKOTA' aircraft. The corridor feels enclosed and sheltered compared to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza with parked vehicles and construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the narrow alley into an open rooftop or plaza area with parked corporate vehicles and construction barricades. Large digital billboards cover the building walls while the distant city skyline is visible through the haze. The space feels more open and industrial compared to the enclosed alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon-lit city intersection into the enclosed corridors of a corporate district, finally emerging into an industrial rooftop plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk by a GUAPO neon billboard, turning right to reveal a wide intersection dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and a curving elevated highway ramp. As the camera pans up to the skyline and back down to the reflective wet pavement, it then pivots to walk back along the sidewalk past holographic advertising pillars and NPCs resting near a MILFGUARD display. The scene shifts from the open street into a narrow, sheltered walkway lined with NOKOTA aircraft billboards and overhead power lines, creating a sense of urban enclosure. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley into an open plaza featuring parked corporate vehicles and construction barricades, with the distant city skyline visible through the atmospheric haze.
